subject: Input: wdt87xx_i2c - replace mdelay() with msleep() in wdt87xx_resume()
notes: Independent POC generated for rep2 (not reused from rep1).
Verifier-v1 needed a single-function slice (poc-for-verifier.c containing only _buggy) to align F5.return count with seed-slice (poc whole-file has 5 returns because _fixed also counts; slice has 4).
Strict pass on first POC attempt: F1.acq=0 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=4 F2.if=1.

Initial query used `n.matches("%_resume")` etc., which missed `wdt87xx_resume_buggy` (POC artifact suffix). Repaired in 1 iter by switching to token-based matching `n.matches("%_<tok>")` OR `n.matches("%_<tok>_%")` OR `n = <tok>` — still POC-artifact-agnostic and generic over the kernel.
Query is generic (Q6-compliant): no hardcoded paths or `_buggy`/`_fixed` substrings; matches any function whose name contains a sleepable-context token (resume/suspend/probe/init/etc.).
POC sha256 frozen at 466fdcd0... and verified unchanged after Stage F.
